title: Creative Business Headshot Photography
brief: I'm looking for a talented photographer to capture a creative and dynamic headshot for my professional business profile. The photoshoot will take place in a studio. Ideal skills and experience: - Proven experience in professional headshot photography - Ability to create creative and dynamic compositions - Proficiency in studio lighting and setup - Strong portfolio showcasing diverse styles - Excellent communication skills to direct poses and expressions Please provide a portfolio with similar work and a detailed quote.
